overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking through an empty modern European city, featuring the Council of the European Union building and contemporary glass architecture. The environment is rendered in a game engine with bright daylight and clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern urban plaza with curved glass architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an empty urban road with modern glass buildings on the left side

entered.detail: large modern building with reflective curved glass facade
wide paved pedestrian area with marked lines
city skyline with various office buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an empty modern urban plaza with a large curved glass building dominating the left side. The area is brightly lit with clear skies, and the paved surface stretches ahead toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: council of the european union building approach

events.description: text overlay 'COUNCIL OF THE EUROPEAN UNION' appears prominently on screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the large dark facade of the Council building while walking along the plaza

entered.detail: large dark brown institutional building with the text 'COUNCIL OF THE EUROPEAN UNION'
tall pine trees lining the approach to the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Council of the European Union building, a large dark structure with tall evergreen trees lining the path. A text overlay identifies the building as the character continues walking along the paved plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: council building exterior with tree-lined walkway

events.description: character begins turning left toward the colorful crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the Council building passing rows of evergreen trees, then turning toward a crosswalk

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing with red and yellow painted markings on the asphalt
rounded modern office building with horizontal window bands

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the side of the Council building, passing tall evergreen trees before turning toward a colorful marked crosswalk. A curved office building becomes visible across the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with colorful pedestrian crossing

events.description: character steps onto the colorful crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the colorful pedestrian crosswalk and continuing down the urban street

entered.detail: contemporary urban buildings lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the brightly colored pedestrian crosswalk, moving away from the Council building toward a new section of the downtown area. The surroundings transition to a different urban street with modern buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, modern urban plaza that transitions from the vicinity of a glass landmark toward a bustling downtown street. It begins with the character walking along a paved expanse dominated by a large curved glass building under clear skies. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward the dark facade of the Council of the European Union building, with the path becoming lined by tall evergreen trees. The camera then follows the character past these trees and toward a colorful marked crosswalk, revealing a curved office building across the open plaza. Finally, the movement carries the character across the pedestrian crossing and away from the Council building, transitioning into a new urban section flanked by contemporary architecture on both sides.
